install: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq nginx 2>/dev/null; chmod +x scripts/test-env.sh scripts/test-env-build.sh

terminals.name: datagent-landing-dev
terminals.command: mkdir -p /tmp/nginx-body && nginx -c /workspace/docker/nginx.dev.conf -g 'daemon off;' || (./scripts/test-env.sh stop; ./scripts/test-env.sh start; tail -f /tmp/datagent-nginx-access.log)
